title: Cleanup build scratch dir if remote end disconnects while passing the context
body:
So if the remote ends discoonects then the scratch dir with context can be lefter around.

This moves the defered cleanup func to stop this happening.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

```release-note
Make sure we always clean up the remote build context on error  
```

comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit 3a9eef4beed4669aa307dc204a6ab1342674e87c. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.
Can you add a test for this?

Yeah I'm not sure how as I'm pretty new to the podman code base (few days)
and this sort of test where we cancel while a remote context is being
transferred can be racy if not done correctly.
